failure_story: Transformation costs remain structural, normalized RoTCE stays below the cost of equity, and a credit/regulatory shock traps or destroys capital.
earliest_warning_signals: RoTCE fails to improve after notable items and transformation spending normalize.
CET1 headroom narrows despite retained earnings.
Allowance, net charge-offs, operational losses or regulatory costs rise together.
forensic_checks: Publish or derive a stable segment tangible-capital and normalized RoTCE bridge.
Reconcile quarterly CET1 headroom and approved capital return.
Complete portfolio-level severe stress with post-stress CET1.
unresolved_items: No dedicated current short-seller primary record was available in the frozen packet.
Segment tangible capital and through-cycle returns cannot be independently reproduced.
A CET1 walk from binding requirement through management buffer, stress loss and approved distributions is absent.
A common severe credit, funding, legal, operational and market stress bridge is absent.
